name: Hasta La Vista, Baby - Restaurant & Rooftop Bar

name: Strandzuid
address: Europaplein 22, 1078 GZ Amsterdam
notes: Great for in summer as they have outdoor seating, its right by the water. Food is okay, the best thing this place is for is private buyout for events. We did an EOQ there with a BBQ.

name: Nela Restaurant
address: Beethovenstraat 515, 1083 HK Amsterdam
notes: It is a bit on the pricey side, it is a vibey restaurant with a lovely interior. EA team did a dinner here.

name: The SIREN Restaurant & Bar
address: Rokin 83, 1012 KL Amsterdam
notes: Really cool interior, tables have a button you can press for champagne. Food is great also, they do group menus.

name: Mata Hari
address: Oudezijds Achterburgwal 22, 1012 DM Amsterdam
notes: In the center of town, handy if you want to take a boat to town and have dinner after. Very much in the redlight district.
